examples: He zigzagged his way across the field.
I zigzagged down a labyrinth of alleys.
Oil RIGS pumped on it and power lines zigzagged all over it.
He collected one of his seven goals when a teammate's shot deflected off his chin and zigzagged past an opposing goaltender.
As they passed the angular budded branches by the big glass doors to the street, a woman zigzagged into their path.
